beats.narration: Rigid borescope, fiberscope, video borescope — three scope families for remote inspection. Choosing the right one comes down to three questions.

payload.title: PICK THE SCOPE
payload.sub: Rigid, fiber, or video — three questions decide.

beats.narration: What's the path — straight or curved? How far must you reach? And what must you resolve and record?
Straight path, finest detail? That's the rigid borescope. The image rides precision glass the whole way — the best picture of any scope family.
Curved path or long reach? Go flexible. Need recording and measurement? The video borescope, with its sensor at the tip, is the default choice.
Path, reach, resolution — answer those and the scope picks itself. Just verify resolution at working distance before you call anything good.

payload.sub: Answer those three and the scope picks itself.
